system.description: The character specializes in exterminating the insects, slimes, and swarms that plague the underdark. With a proficiency throw of 11+, he can identify the abilities and vulnerabilities of various vermin based on their physical appearance. He receives a +1 bonus when making saving throws against special attacks by vermin (e.g. a carcass scavenger's paralyzing stinger or yellow mold's spores).
